option_line: zgr_postWeirdOptProceed:"I believe I found what you're looking for. And more."
original: I believe I found what you're looking for. And more.
translated: Je crois avoir trouve ce que vous cherchez. Et davantage.

option_line: zgr_postWeirdOptHostile:"I found something... hostile. In the Abyss."
original: I found something... hostile. In the Abyss.
translated: J'ai trouve quelque chose... d'hostile. Dans l'Abime.

original:
"Excellent."

To your shock, her smile is nearly human. The mask is replaced almost instantly, though a slackening echo of the expression remains on her lips.

"I, and my researchers, are most eager to examine your findings. And you to be paid, no doubt."
translated:
"Excellent."

A votre stupefaction, son sourire est presque humain. Le masque revient presque instantanement, bien qu'un echo de cette expression subsiste sur ses levres.

"Moi et mes chercheurs sommes tres impatients d'examiner vos decouvertes. Et vous d'etre paye, sans aucun doute."

original:
"It pleases me to hear that." She doesn't smile.

"I, and my researchers, are most eager to examine your findings. And you to be paid, no doubt.
translated:
"Cela me fait plaisir de l'entendre." Elle ne sourit pas.

"Moi et mes chercheurs sommes tres impatients d'examiner vos decouvertes. Et vous d'etre paye, sans aucun doute.

original:
"Something." She raises an eyebrow.

"It was not human or AI-derived." This doesn't sound like a question.
translated:
"Quelque chose." Elle hausse un sourcil.

"Ce n'etait ni humain ni derive d'une IA." Cela ne ressemble pas a une question.

original:
Her eyes, previously distant, stare at you through the link for a several seconds before she replies.

"I am eager to reward you for your work." Her tone is not inviting. "CEO Sun is in full agreement. There are extraordinary discoveries and profits to be made. I am uninterested in an obstinate parody of negotiation."
translated:
Ses yeux, auparavant distants, vous fixent a travers le lien pendant plusieurs secondes avant qu'elle ne reponde.

"Je suis impatiente de vous recompenser pour votre travail." Son ton n'est pas engageant. "Le PDG Sun est entierement d'accord. Il y a des decouvertes et des profits extraordinaires a faire. Je ne suis pas interessee par une parodie obstinee de negociation."

option_line: zgr_postWeirdNothingProceed:"And I am eager to be paid. You got me."
original: And I am eager to be paid. You got me.
translated: Et moi je suis impatient d'etre paye. Vous m'avez eu.

original:
"Don't act this obstinate pretense of negotiation. You $shipOrFleet has been scanned. And we knew what you found well before you arrived anyway." She pauses quite consciously.

"I am... most eager to reward your work."

Despite her words, the tone is icy. "CEO Sun is in full agreement. We may share in extraordinary discoveries and profits."
translated:
"Arretez cette pretention obstinee de negociation. Votre $shipOrFleet a ete scanne. Et nous savions ce que vous aviez trouve bien avant votre arrivee." Elle marque une pause tres deliberee.

"Je suis... tres impatiente de recompenser votre travail."

Malgre ses mots, le ton est glacial. "Le PDG Sun est entierement d'accord. Nous pouvons partager des decouvertes et des profits extraordinaires."
